text: Being here, I feel an anticipatory curiosity. The first room, with its glass partitions and distant figures, suggests a place of active engagement and intellectual exchange. Stepping into the next space, I am drawn to the interplay between research, design, and reflection. The wall’s message about the unity of nature and construction sparks a sense of wonder in me—how fascinating that human creativity continually seeks to connect and coexist, not just with the world but also with itself. Here, I sense calm thoughtfulness, mixed with the vibrancy of collective learning.
